title: Come Sit at My Table – Week 5
description: BUSINESS NEWS - The RoosInc Duo, Alta Roos...
bodyText:
Sponsored Content

BUSINESS NEWS - The RoosInc Duo, Alta Roos and Chane van Zyl, are back on Eden FM this week for Come Sit at My Table – A Journey to a Legacy of Loving Order.

So far, we’ve explored:

- Your personal documents
- Your last will and testament
- Your movable and immovable assets
- Your financial assets and insurance

This week we move on to addressing liabilities in a deceased estate.

Alta and Chane will explain how to list, manage and document all debts, taxes, and other financial obligations so your loved ones aren’t left with uncertainty or surprises.

Tune in to Eden FM at 15:30 every Tuesday until 2 December.


> Catch the weekly highlights in the George Herald, page 2, every Thursday.


Visit www.roosinc.co.za for previous sessions and resources.

Kom Sit aan My Tafel – Week 5

Die RoosInc-duo, Alta Roos en Chane van Zyl, is hierdie week weer terug op Eden FM met Kom Sit aan My Tafel – ’n Reis na ’n Nalatenskap van Liefdevolle Orde.

Tot dusver het ons gesels oor:

- Jou persoonlike dokumente
- Jou laaste wil en testament
- Jou roerende en onroerende bates
- Jou finansiële bates en versekering

Hierdie week gesels ons oor laste en verpligtinge in ‘n bestorwe boedel.

Alta en Chane verduidelik hoe om al jou skuld, belasting en ander finansiële verpligtinge duidelik aan te teken sodat jy geen onaangename verrassings vir jou geliefdes nalaat nie.

Luister elke Dinsdag om 15:30 op Eden FM, en lees elke Donderdag meer in die George Herald, bladsy 2.

Besoek www.roosinc.co.za vir vorige sessies en hulpmiddels.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
